ki.description: WeiDU may crash (0xc0000005) during process cleanup after successfully installing Tidings. The mod installs correctly — the crash occurs during teardown, not installation. Check WeiDU.log to confirm the component was installed.
ki.workaround: Retry or verify WeiDU.log. The mod_installer will auto-detect this as a warning if the component is in WeiDU.log.

sum: A quest mod for Baldur's Gate II that starts in the Docks District of Athkatla and introduces new areas, enemies, and items for parties around levels 9-12.

co.no: Dark Tidings: ominous portents and dark forces in BG2.
